{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged whip
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Ekeri]] uses a [[Forged whip]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
